name: Powerline Neon
description: Cyberpunk/retro neon statusline with vivid neon backgrounds (hot pink → cyan → lime → violet) and thin powerline arrows. Eye-catching hacker aesthetic.
features: Vivid neon segment backgrounds: hot pink, electric cyan, neon lime, deep violet
Segment 1: Model name on hot pink background
Segment 2: Context usage bar — color-coded (cyan/amber/red) by load level
Segment 3: Session cost on neon lime background
Segment 4: Git branch with staged/modified counts (when in a repo)
Segment 5: Duration and lines changed on dark trailer segment
Thin powerline dividers between sections within segments
